title: SilicAI Component
description: Structured description of an electronic component for AI-assisted circuit design

manufacturer.description: Component manufacturer name (e.g. Texas Instruments, STMicroelectronics)

category.description: Component category for grouping and AI-assisted selection

datasheet.description: URL to the official datasheet PDF

kicad_symbol.description: KiCad library symbol reference, e.g. Sensor_Temperature:TMP117xxYBG

absolute_maximum_ratings.description: Conditions that must never be exceeded to avoid permanent damage

recommended_operating_conditions.description: Conditions for normal operation as specified in the datasheet

temperature_range.description: Operating and storage temperature limits, junction temperature, and thermal resistance

power_consumption.description: Supply current per operating mode for power budgeting

timing.description: Timing parameters (setup/hold times, propagation delays, rise/fall times)

rails.description: Power supply rails with their decoupling requirements

pins.description: Pin definitions including electrical characteristics and functions

interfaces.description: Communication interfaces exposed by the component

remark.description: Free-form note about this component (e.g. known errata, special design requirements, recommended alternatives)
